message:
feat(fcp-store): add GC audit transcript with explainable per-object decisions and O(1) zone index

The GC subsystem now produces a machine-readable audit transcript
explaining why each object was kept, evicted, or deferred during a
sweep, enabling deterministic test assertions and future audit logging.

gc.rs:
- GcDecisionAction enum: Keep, Evict, Defer
- GcReasonCode enum (8 variants): RootCheckpoint, RootPin, ReachableRef,
  RetentionPinned, LeaseActive, LeaseExpired, LeasePolicyCollect,
  UnreachableEphemeral — stable wire format for audit consumers
- GcDecision: object_id + retention_class + action + reason + checkpoint
- GcTranscript: ordered Vec<GcDecision> + started_at/completed_at
- GcRunReport: full-run summary with serde round-trip guarantee
- collect_with_transcript() and collect_and_prune_symbols_with_transcript()
  public methods
- Internal sweep loop refactored to produce per-object decision records
  with deterministic ordering (objects sorted before evaluation)
- 4 new unit tests: deterministic reasons, policy collection for active
  leases, wire format stability, serde roundtrip

object_store.rs:
- Add zone_index: RwLock<HashMap<ZoneId, Vec<ObjectId>>> to
  MemoryObjectStore for O(1) list_zone() instead of O(n) full scan
- put() maintains zone index, delete() removes from it

lib.rs: Export new GC types. Doc rebrand from "FCP2" to "FCPS-aligned".

tests/no_mock_integration.rs:
- gc_collect_with_transcript_exposes_reason_log (150 lines): exercises
  all 5 reason codes + deferred budget
- gc_run_report_serde roundtrip test

Cargo.toml: Add jsonschema dev-dep, remove fcp-testkit dev-dep.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
